compact.title: Open on a desktop to edit
compact.body: Journal entries use a wide, multi-column layout. Switch to a larger screen to add or edit entries.

deleteDialog.title: Delete selected entries?
deleteDialog.body_one: Delete {{count}} draft entry? This cannot be undone.
deleteDialog.body_other: Delete {{count}} draft entries? This cannot be undone.

approveErrors.title: Some entries could not be approved
approveErrors.summary_one: {{count}} entry was left as a draft. Fix the issues below and try again.
approveErrors.summary_other: {{count}} entries were left as a draft. Fix the issues below and try again.

codes.unbalanced_journal: Debits and credits do not balance.
codes.invalid_account_code: A line is missing a valid account.
codes.missing_side: A line needs a debit or credit amount.
codes.invalid_amount: A line amount must be greater than zero.
codes.accounting_not_configured: Required accounting accounts are not configured (check Settings).
